<style>
:root { --navy: #0A2540; --orange: #FF5E14; --white: #ffffff; }

body {
    margin: 0;
    font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
    padding-top: 110px; /* Navbar height ke hisab se padding badha di */
}

.header-wrapper {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    z-index: 999999;
    background: var(--white);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
}

/* Navbar height thodi badhai taaki bada logo fit ho sake */
.navbar { height: 110px; display: flex; align-items: center; }
.nav-container { width: 94%; max-width: 1550px; margin: 0 auto; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; }

/* LOGO SIZE INCREASED */
.logo img {
    height: 90px; /* Height 65px se 90px kar di hai */
    width: auto;
    display: block;
    transition: 0.3s;
    padding: 5px 0;
}

.desktop-menu { display: flex; align-items: center; }
.menu-links { display: flex; list-style: none; gap: 40px; align-items: center; margin:0; padding:0; }
.nav-item { color: var(--navy); font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; text-decoration: none; position: relative; padding: 10px 0; display: flex; align-items: center; transition: 0.3s; cursor:pointer;}
.nav-item::after { content: ''; position: absolute; width: 0; height: 3px; bottom: -2px; left: 0; background: var(--orange); border-radius: 10px; transition: 0.3s; }
.nav-item:hover { color: var(--orange); }
.nav-item:hover::after { width: 100%; }
.u-tn { font-size: 10px; margin-left: 6px; }

/* DROPDOWNS - Positioning adjust ki taaki gap na dikhe */
.d-dropdown { position: relative; height: 110px; display: flex; align-items: center; }
.d-dropdown-content { position: absolute; top: 110px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(15px); background: var(--white); min-width: 250px; list-style: none; padding: 15px 0; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border-radius: 12px; border-top: 4px solid var(--orange); opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; transition: 0.3s ease; z-index: 1000; }
.d-dropdown:hover .d-dropdown-content { opacity: 1; visibility: visible; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); }
.d-dropdown-content li a { display: block; padding: 12px 25px; font-size: 14.5px; color: var(--navy); text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; transition: 0.2s; }
.d-dropdown-content li a:hover { background: #fff8f5; color: var(--orange); padding-left: 35px; }

.mobile-toggle { display: none; font-size: 28px; color: var(--navy); background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; }
.mobile-menu { position: fixed; top: 0; right: -100%; width: 85%; max-width: 400px; height: 100vh; background: white; z-index: 1000000; transition: 0.4s ease-in-out; box-shadow: -10px 0 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); }
.mobile-menu.active { right: 0; }
.mobile-menu-inner { padding: 30px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.mob-menu-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 30px; border-bottom: 2px solid #f1f1f1; padding-bottom: 15px; }
.mob-menu-header span { font-weight: 800; font-size: 20px; color: var(--navy); }
.mob-menu-header i { font-size: 24px; color: var(--orange); cursor: pointer; }
.mobile-links-container { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px; }
.mobile-links-container a, .mob-acc-trigger { text-decoration: none; color: var(--navy); font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; padding: 10px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f9f9f9; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; cursor: pointer; }
.mob-acc-content { max-height: 0; overflow: hidden; transition: 0.3s ease-out; background: #fcfcfc; padding-left: 15px; }
.mob-acc-content.open { max-height: 500px; padding-top: 10px; padding-bottom: 10px; }
.mob-acc-content a { font-size: 15px; color: #555; font-weight: 500; border: none; }
.mob-acc-trigger.active i { transform: rotate(180deg); color: var(--orange); }

@media (max-width: 991px) {
    .desktop-menu { display: none; }
    .mobile-toggle { display: block; }
    .navbar { height: 90px; }
    .logo img { height: 75px; } /* Mobile par thoda chota par clear */
    body { padding-top: 90px; }
}
</style>

<script>
    function toggleMobileMenu() {
        const menu = document.getElementById('mobileMenu');
        menu.classList.toggle('active');
        document.body.style.overflow = menu.classList.contains('active') ? 'hidden' : 'auto';
    }

    function toggleMobAcc(id) {
        const content = document.getElementById(id);
        const trigger = content.previousElementSibling;
        trigger.classList.toggle('active');
        content.classList.toggle('open');
    }
</script><!-- WhatsApp Floating Icon by Revmerito (Fixed Mobile & Message) -->

.whatsapp-float {

/* PARTNERS SECTION CSS */
:root {
    --rvm-bg: #f9f9f9;
}

.partner-section {
    background: var(--rvm-bg);
    padding: 60px 0;
    border-top: 1px solid #eee;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
    overflow: hidden;
    font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
}

.partner-heading {
    text-align: center;
    color: #555;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    margin-bottom: 40px;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
}

.slider {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    overflow: hidden;
}

/* Side Fades */
.slider::before,
.slider::after {
    background: linear-gradient(to right, #f9f9f9 0%, rgba(249, 249, 249, 0) 100%);
    content: "";
    height: 100%;
    position: absolute;
    width: 100px;
    z-index: 2;
    top: 0;
}
.slider::before { left: 0; }
.slider::after { right: 0; transform: rotateZ(180deg); }

/* The Moving Track - Width fixed for 24 items */
.slide-track {
    display: flex;
    /* Desktop: 200px width + 40px margin = 240px per item. 240 * 24 items = 5760px */
    width: calc(240px * 24);
    animation: scroll 40s linear infinite;
}

/* Individual Card */
.slide {
    width: 200px;
    height: 90px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    background: white;
    margin: 0 20px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    padding: 20px;
    border: 1px solid transparent;
}

.slide img {
    max-width: 100%;
    max-height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    filter: none;
    opacity: 1;
}

.logo-text {
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
    text-align: center;
    line-height: 1;
}

/* Hover */
.slide:hover {
    transform: translateY(-5px);
    box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
    border-color: #eee;
}

/* --- KEYFRAMES (Re-added) --- */
@keyframes scroll {
    0% { transform: translateX(0); }
    100% {
        /* Move exactly half (12 items) */
        /* 12 * 240px = 2880px */
        transform: translateX(calc(-240px * 12));
    }
}

/* Mobile Responsive */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .slide {
        width: 150px;
        height: 75px;
        margin: 0 10px; /* 150+20 = 170px total */
        padding: 15px;
    }

    .logo-text { font-size: 1.2rem; }

    /* Adjust Width & Animation for Mobile */
    .slide-track {
        /* 170px * 24 items */
        width: calc(170px * 24);
    }

    @keyframes scroll {
        0% { transform: translateX(0); }
        100% {
            /* 170px * 12 items */
            transform: translateX(calc(-170px * 12));
        }
    }
}
</style>				</div>

/* Aapka original CSS */

.year-big-watermark { position: absolute; top: -20px; right: -20px; font-size: 15rem; font-weight: 900; color: rgba(0,0,0,0.03); line-height: 1; pointer-events: none; }
.timeline-card h3 { color: #FF5E14; font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.timeline-card p { color: #555; font-size: 1.1rem; line-height: 1.7; }
</style>

<script>
    const yearData = {
        2017: { title: "2017: The Inception", desc: "Revmerito begins its journey with a small, passionate team." },
        2018: { title: "2018: Building Partnerships", desc: "Secured our first 50 key partners and expanded operations." },
        2019: { title: "2019: Global Outreach", desc: "Opened international offices in Dubai and Singapore." },
        2020: { title: "2020: Resilience & Innovation", desc: "Launched critical tools to help hotels survive the global pause." },
        2021: { title: "2021: Technology Leap", desc: "Introduced AI-driven auditing and reporting systems." },
        2022: { title: "2022: Scaling Up", desc: "Crossed the milestone of 500+ satisfied hotel partners." },
        2023: { title: "2023: Industry Recognition", desc: "Awarded 'Best Hospitality Tech Partner' of the year." },
        2024: { title: "2024: AI Integration", desc: "Deep integration of Machine Learning for predictive revenue models." },
        2025: { title: "2025: Defining the Future", desc: "Setting new standards in hospitality with automation." }
    };

    let currentIndex = 0;
    const totalYears = Object.keys(yearData).length;
    let autoPlayInterval;
    let resumeTimeout;

    function activateYear(index) {
        currentIndex = index;
        const year = 2017 + index;
        const items = document.querySelectorAll('.year-item');
        const scrollContainer = document.getElementById('scrollContainer');
        const progressLine = document.getElementById('progressLine');

        // 1. Progress Line Calculation
        const percent = (index / (totalYears - 1)) * 100;
        progressLine.style.width = percent + "%";

        // 2. Update Active States
        items.forEach((item, idx) => {
            if (idx <= index) {
                item.classList.add('active');
            } else {
                item.classList.remove('active');
            }
        });

        // 3. Robust Scroll Logic
        const targetItem = items[index];
        if (targetItem && scrollContainer) {
            // Container ki width aur item ki position calculate kar rahe hain
            const containerWidth = scrollContainer.offsetWidth;
            const itemOffset = targetItem.offsetLeft;
            const itemWidth = targetItem.offsetWidth;

            // Item ko center mein laane ke liye formula
            const scrollPos = itemOffset - (containerWidth / 2) + (itemWidth / 2);

            scrollContainer.scrollTo({
                left: scrollPos,
                behavior: 'smooth'
            });
        }

        // 4. Update Content with Fade Effect (Optional)
        const contentArea = document.getElementById('timelineContent');
        contentArea.style.opacity = "0.5"; // Subtle flicker for change

        setTimeout(() => {
            document.getElementById('yearTitle').innerText = yearData[year].title;
            document.getElementById('yearDesc').innerText = yearData[year].desc;
            document.getElementById('yearWatermark').innerText = year;
            contentArea.style.opacity = "1";
        }, 200);
    }

    function startAutoPlay() {
        stopAutoPlay();
        autoPlayInterval = setInterval(() => {
            currentIndex = (currentIndex + 1) % totalYears;
            activateYear(currentIndex);
        }, 3000); // 1.5s thoda fast tha, 3s organic lagta hai
    }

    function stopAutoPlay() {
        clearInterval(autoPlayInterval);
        clearTimeout(resumeTimeout);
    }

    function manualActivate(index, year) {
        stopAutoPlay();
        activateYear(index);
        // User activity ke 5 second baad autoplay restart hoga
        resumeTimeout = setTimeout(startAutoPlay, 5000);
    }

    // Initialize on Load
    window.addEventListener('load', () => {
        activateYear(0);
        startAutoPlay();
    });
</script>				</div>

<script>

    const formContainer = document.getElementById('form-container'); // Make sure your wrapper has this ID
    const successMsg = document.getElementById('success-msg');
    const submitBtn = document.getElementById('submit-btn');
    const btnText = document.getElementById('btn-text');

    contactForm.addEventListener('submit', async function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();

        btnText.innerText = "Sending...";
        submitBtn.disabled = true;

        const formData = new FormData(contactForm);

        try {
            const response = await fetch(contactForm.action, {
                method: 'POST',
                body: formData
            });

            const result = await response.text();

            if (response.ok && result.trim() === "Success") {
                // Form hide aur Success message show
                contactForm.style.display = "none";
                if(successMsg) successMsg.style.display = "block";
                alert("Thank you! Your message has been sent."); // Backup alert
            } else {
                alert("Error: " + result);
                btnText.innerText = "Schedule Your Call With Us Today";
                submitBtn.disabled = false;
            }
        } catch (error) {
            alert("Connection error. Please try again.");
            btnText.innerText = "Schedule Your Call With Us Today";
            submitBtn.disabled = false;
        }
    });

<script>
    const contactForm = document.getElementById('revmerito-contact-form');
    const formContainer = document.getElementById('form-container');
    const successMsg = document.getElementById('success-msg');
    const submitBtn = document.getElementById('submit-btn');
    const btnText = document.getElementById('btn-text');

    contactForm.addEventListener('submit', async function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();

        btnText.innerText = "Sending...";
        submitBtn.disabled = true;
        submitBtn.style.opacity = "0.7";

        const formData = new FormData(contactForm);

        try {
            const response = await fetch(contactForm.action, {
                method: 'POST',
                body: formData,
                headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' }
            });

            if (response.ok) {
                formContainer.style.display = "none";
                successMsg.style.display = "block";
                contactForm.reset();
            } else {
                alert("Something went wrong. Please check your Formspree ID.");
                btnText.innerText = "Schedule Your Call With Us Today";
                submitBtn.disabled = false;
                submitBtn.style.opacity = "1";
            }
        } catch (error) {
            alert("Connection error. Check your internet.");
            btnText.innerText = "Schedule Your Call With Us Today";
            submitBtn.disabled = false;
        }
    });

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  const counters = document.querySelectorAll(".counter");

  function startCounting() {
    counters.forEach(counter => {
      const target = +counter.dataset.target;
      let count = 0;
      const speed = 40;

      const updateCount = () => {
        const increment = Math.ceil(target / speed);
        count += increment;

        if (count < target) {
          counter.textContent = count + "+";
          setTimeout(updateCount, 30);
        } else {
          counter.textContent = target + "+";
        }
      };

      updateCount();
    });
  }

  function resetCounters() {
    counters.forEach(counter => {
      counter.textContent = "0";
    });
  }

  const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
    entries => {
      entries.forEach(entry => {
        if (entry.isIntersecting) {
          startCounting(); // start every time visible
        } else {
          resetCounters(); // reset when out of view
        }
      });
    },
    { threshold: 0.4 }
  );

  observer.observe(document.querySelector(".stats-section"));
});
</script>

<script>
    const wrapper = document.querySelector('.orbit-wrapper');
    const cards = document.querySelectorAll('.orbit-card');
    const nextBtn = document.querySelector('.orbit-next');
    const prevBtn = document.querySelector('.orbit-prev');

    let current = 0;

    function updateOrbit() {
        cards.forEach((card, i) => {
            card.classList.remove('active', 'left', 'right');

            if (i === current) {
                card.classList.add('active');
            } else if (i === (current - 1 + cards.length) % cards.length) {
                card.classList.add('left');
            } else if (i === (current + 1) % cards.length) {
                card.classList.add('right');
            }
        });
    }

    nextBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        current = (current + 1) % cards.length;
        updateOrbit();
    });

    prevBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        current = (current - 1 + cards.length) % cards.length;
        updateOrbit();
    });

    // Auto rotate
    setInterval(() => {
        current = (current + 1) % cards.length;
        updateOrbit();
    }, 5000);

    // Initial load
    updateOrbit();
</script>				</div>

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-f6f4a91 elementor-widget elementor-widget-html" data-id="f6f4a91" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="html.default">
					<section class="faq-section" id="faqs">
  <div class="faq-container">

    <div class="faq-header">
      <h2>Frequently Asked Questions</h2>
      <span class="faq-divider"></span>
      <p>Everything you need to know about our revenue management services.</p>
    </div>

    <!-- FAQ ITEM 1 -->
    <div class="faq-item">
      <input type="checkbox" id="faq1">
      <label for="faq1" class="faq-question">
        <span>1. What is hotel revenue management?</span>
        <span class="faq-icon"></span>
      </label>
      <div class="faq-answer">
        <p>
         Hotel revenue management is a data-driven strategy to sell the right room to the right guest at the right time for the right price. It involves analyzing market demand, competitor pricing, booking patterns, and historical data to optimize your room rates and maximize revenue. Rather than using fixed pricing, revenue management uses dynamic pricing that adjusts based on demand—similar to how airlines price tickets. The goal is to increase your overall revenue and profitability while maintaining healthy occupancy levels.
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- FAQ ITEM 2 -->
    <div class="faq-item">
      <input type="checkbox" id="faq2">
      <label for="faq2" class="faq-question">
        <span>2.How much does revenue management cost?</span>
        <span class="faq-icon"></span>
      </label>
      <div class="faq-answer">
        <p>
         Revenue management services typically work on a performance-based model, often charging a percentage of revenue increase (usually 4-8%) or a flat monthly fee based on property size. Many providers offer flexible pricing structures including commission-based (you only pay when revenue increases), monthly retainer, or hybrid models. The investment typically pays for itself many times over through increased revenue. For a 50-room hotel, you might invest $1,500-$3,000 per month, but see $10,000-$20,000 in additional monthly revenue. We offer customized pricing based on your property size and needs—contact us for a detailed quote.
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- FAQ ITEM 3 -->
    <div class="faq-item">
      <input type="checkbox" id="faq3">
      <label for="faq3" class="faq-question">
        <span>3.Can I still offer discounts and promotions?</span>
        <span class="faq-icon"></span>
      </label>
      <div class="faq-answer">
        <p>
        Yes, absolutely! Revenue management doesn't eliminate discounts—it makes them strategic. We help you determine when, where, and how much to discount to maximize impact. Instead of blanket discounts that erode profit, we use strategic promotions targeted at the right times (low-demand periods), right channels (direct bookings vs OTAs), and right guest segments (corporate, leisure, extended stay). We'll also help you create packages that add value without reducing rates, and implement rate fencing strategies so you can offer competitive pricing while protecting your premium segments. Smart discounting is part of effective revenue management.
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- FAQ ITEM 4 -->
    <div class="faq-item">
      <input type="checkbox" id="faq4">
      <label for="faq4" class="faq-question">
        <span>4.Will my rates be too high and scare away guests?</span>
        <span class="faq-icon"></span>
      </label>
      <div class="faq-answer">
        <p>
         No. Revenue management is not about pricing yourself out of the market—it's about finding the optimal price point that maximizes revenue while maintaining occupancy. We carefully monitor competitor pricing, market positioning, and booking pace to ensure your rates remain competitive. During high-demand periods, we may price higher (because guests are willing to pay more), but during slower periods, we'll optimize rates to attract bookings. The result is usually increased occupancy at better average rates. We also use psychological pricing strategies and rate integrity practices to maintain your brand value while staying competitive.

        </p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- FAQ ITEM 5 (NEW DUMMY FAQ) -->
    <div class="faq-item">
      <input type="checkbox" id="faq5">
      <label for="faq5" class="faq-question">
        <span>5.How quickly will I see results?</span>
        <span class="faq-icon"></span>
      </label>
      <div class="faq-answer">
        <p>
        Most hotels start seeing improvements within the first 30-60 days. Early wins often include better rate positioning, improved booking pace, and increased RevPAR (Revenue Per Available Room). More substantial revenue growth becomes clear within 3-6 months as strategies mature and adapt to seasonal patterns. Properties with less sophisticated pricing typically see faster, more dramatic results, while those already doing some revenue management see steady optimization gains. We provide weekly and monthly performance reports so you can track progress from day one. The key is consistency—revenue management is a long-term strategy that compounds results over time.
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );

					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',

      const increment = Math.ceil(target / 40);

      const update = () => {
        count += increment;
        if (count < target) {
          counter.innerText = count + "+";
          setTimeout(update, 30);
        } else {
          counter.innerText = target + "+";
        }
      };
      update();
    });

    started = true;
  }

  const observer = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
    if (entries[0].isIntersecting) {
      startCount();
    }
  }, { threshold: 0.4 });

  const section = document.querySelector(".stats-section");
  if (section) observer.observe(section);
});
</script>

Everything you need to know about our revenue management services.

Hotel revenue management is a data-driven strategy to sell the right room to the right guest at the right time for the right price. It involves analyzing market demand, competitor pricing, booking patterns, and historical data to optimize your room rates and maximize revenue. Rather than using fixed pricing, revenue management uses dynamic pricing that adjusts based on demand—similar to how airlines price tickets. The goal is to increase your overall revenue and profitability while maintaining healthy occupancy levels.

Revenue management services typically work on a performance-based model, often charging a percentage of revenue increase (usually 4-8%) or a flat monthly fee based on property size. Many providers offer flexible pricing structures including commission-based (you only pay when revenue increases), monthly retainer, or hybrid models. The investment typically pays for itself many times over through increased revenue. For a 50-room hotel, you might invest $1,500-$3,000 per month, but see $10,000-$20,000 in additional monthly revenue. We offer customized pricing based on your property size and needs—contact us for a detailed quote.
3.Can I still offer discounts and promotions?

Yes, absolutely! Revenue management doesn't eliminate discounts—it makes them strategic. We help you determine when, where, and how much to discount to maximize impact. Instead of blanket discounts that erode profit, we use strategic promotions targeted at the right times (low-demand periods), right channels (direct bookings vs OTAs), and right guest segments (corporate, leisure, extended stay). We'll also help you create packages that add value without reducing rates, and implement rate fencing strategies so you can offer competitive pricing while protecting your premium segments. Smart discounting is part of effective revenue management.
4.Will my rates be too high and scare away guests?

No. Revenue management is not about pricing yourself out of the market—it's about finding the optimal price point that maximizes revenue while maintaining occupancy. We carefully monitor competitor pricing, market positioning, and booking pace to ensure your rates remain competitive. During high-demand periods, we may price higher (because guests are willing to pay more), but during slower periods, we'll optimize rates to attract bookings. The result is usually increased occupancy at better average rates. We also use psychological pricing strategies and rate integrity practices to maintain your brand value while staying competitive.

Most hotels start seeing improvements within the first 30-60 days. Early wins often include better rate positioning, improved booking pace, and increased RevPAR (Revenue Per Available Room). More substantial revenue growth becomes clear within 3-6 months as strategies mature and adapt to seasonal patterns. Properties with less sophisticated pricing typically see faster, more dramatic results, while those already doing some revenue management see steady optimization gains. We provide weekly and monthly performance reports so you can track progress from day one. The key is consistency—revenue management is a long-term strategy that compounds results over time.
